particulars.description: (1) 20 kettering road, northampton (NN1 4AH) to be registered at the land registry under title number NN65455,. (2) 22-36 kettering road, northampton (NN1 4AH) to be registered at the land registry under title number NN56340 and. (3) land on the north side of wellingborough road, northampton to be transferred and registered out of title number NN321399.

The freehold property known as 22-36 kettering road, northampton NN1 4AH, land registry title number NN56340; and the freehold property known as 20 kettering road, northampton NN1 4AH, land registry title number NN65455; and any part or parts of it and including all rights attached or appurtenant to it and all buildings fixtures fittings plant and machinery from time to time situated on it.
